name: IRC_HIST_EVENT_VL
query: SELECT B.EVENT_TYPE_ID EVENT_TYPE_ID, B.CODE CODE, TL.NAME NAME, B.SHOW_IN_UI SHOW_IN_UI, B.IS_BACKWARD IS_BACKWARD, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM IRC_HIST_EVENT_B B, IRC_HIST_EVENT_TL TL WHERE B.EVENT_TYPE_ID = TL.EVENT_TYPE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
